title: Data Object
description: Definition of a single Data Object (table, file, or query) with its connection, columns, classifications, extensions, and template mappings used for code generation. One Data Object is stored per file. Custom fields are allowed at every level so consumers can extend the format.

id.title: Id
id.description: Logical path ID for the Data Object (no .json suffix, no data-object/ prefix), e.g. staging/openmeteo/daily-temperature. File lives under data-object/.

name.title: Name
name.description: Mandatory unique name of the Data Object (table or file).

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Free-form description or notes about the Data Object.

dataConnectionId.title: Data Connection Id
dataConnectionId.description: Path ID of a connection artifact under connection/, e.g. connection/staging.

dataItems.title: Data Items
dataItems.description: Collection of columns / attributes that make up the Data Object.

queryCode.title: Query Code
queryCode.description: Optional query body when this Data Object is sourced from a query rather than a physical table.

classifications.title: Classifications
classifications.description: Classification tags applied to the Data Object.

extensions.title: Extensions
extensions.description: Free-form key/value pairs for additional context.

templateMappings.title: Template Mappings
templateMappings.description: Code-generation templates associated with this Data Object.

dataConnection.title: Data Connection
dataConnection.description: Connectivity details for a Data Object.

id.title: Id
id.description: Optional unique identifier. May be empty.

name.title: Name
name.description: Connection token, key, or string identifying the connection.

dataItem.title: Data Item
dataItem.description: An individual column or attribute of a Data Object.

id.title: Id
id.description: Optional unique identifier for the Data Item.

name.title: Name
name.description: Unique name of the column / attribute.

dataType.title: Data Type
dataType.description: Data type of the Data Item (e.g. int, varchar, date). See follow-ups.md for the planned controlled vocabulary.

ordinalPosition.title: Ordinal Position
ordinalPosition.description: Position of the column within the Data Object (1-based).

numericPrecision.title: Numeric Precision
numericPrecision.description: Total number of digits for numeric types.

numericScale.title: Numeric Scale
numericScale.description: Number of digits to the right of the decimal point.

isPrimaryKey.title: Is Primary Key
isPrimaryKey.description: Indicates whether this column is part of the primary key.

classification.title: Classification
classification.description: A tag describing the Data Object, grouped under a classification category.

id.title: Id
id.description: Optional unique identifier. May be empty.

group.title: Group
group.description: Logical grouping for the classification (e.g. 'Solution Layer', 'Solution Area').

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Optional free-form notes for the classification.

extension.title: Extension
extension.description: Free-form key/value pair for additional metadata.

key.title: Key
key.description: The key of the key/value pair.

value.title: Value
value.description: The value of the key/value pair.

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Optional free-form notes for the extension.

templateMapping.title: Template Mapping
templateMapping.description: Association of a code-generation template with the Data Object.

templateFileName.title: Template File Name
templateFileName.description: Path or filename of the template (e.g. Handlebars file) used for code generation.
